title: oenothera ambigua
intro: Oenothera ambigua, also known as Evening Primrose, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to North America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its rich source of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential omega-6 fatty acid. The medicinal properties of Oenothera ambigua include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its numerous health benefits, such as soothing menstrual cramps, reducing inflammation, and promoting skin health. Oenothera ambigua can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and oils for consumption, and it is also used topically in creams and salves to support skin and wound healing.
